zhExample: 離開前請整理好你的書桌。

enExample: The typhoon will reach us tomorrow.
zhExample: 颱風明天會到達我們這裡。

enExample: He was unhappy because he missed the bus.
zhExample: 因為他錯過了公車，他感到不快樂。

enExample: Whose backpack is this on the desk?
She has two cats at home.
Four chairs are around the table.
I use a ruler to draw lines.

zhExample: 我可以借一下你的橡皮擦嗎？

enExample: The marker is red and thick.
My pencil box has many colors.
zhExample: 我的鉛筆盒裡有很多顏色的文具。

enExample: The fox ran into the forest.
The frog jumps into the water.
He wants to be a singer.
Mr. Chen is our math teacher.
zhExample: 陳老師是我們的數學老師。

enExample: I ate a sweet pear today.
zhExample: 我今天吃了一顆甜甜的梨子。

enExample: This peach is soft and juicy.
He opened a can of cola.
My uncle can play the guitar well.
I had a hot dog at the park.
zhExample: 我在公園吃了一根熱狗。
他做了一個鮪魚三明治。

enExample: Apple pie is my grandma’s favorite.
zhExample: 蘋果派是我奶奶最愛的。

enExample: He ate a big hamburger for lunch.
zhExample: 他午餐吃了一個大漢堡。

enExample: I play computer games on weekends.
Do you want to play basketball?
She is flying a kite in the park.
The dog is outside of the house.
He is wearing a blue T-shirt.
I wear socks with my shoes.
I use a comb every morning.
The teacher writes on the blackboard.
We play basketball in PE class.
We watch TV in the living room.
I put food on the plate.
I bought a book at the bookstore.
I take the MRT to school.
He reads a comic book every week.
The cat is under the table.
The picture hangs above the sofa.

zhExample: 他接受了那份工作機會。

enExample: I met him two years ago.
He is popular among his classmates.

zhExample: 任何人都可以參加這個遊戲。
我在網路上讀了一篇文章。
她是一位有才華的藝術家。

enExample: He drank a glass of beer.
The ball is between the boxes.
He took a cab to the airport.
